input.document: The Scottish government has announced a new initiative to plant 18 million trees across the country over the next five years to combat climate change. Environment Secretary Roseanna Cunningham described the programme as the most ambitious of its kind in the UK.

reference.goldSummary: The Scottish government has unveiled plans to plant millions of trees to fight climate change.

input.document: A new study published in the journal Nature suggests that the Atlantic Ocean's circulation system is at its weakest in more than a thousand years. Researchers attribute the slowdown to climate change and warn it could trigger severe weather across Europe and North America.

reference.goldSummary: Scientists warn the Atlantic's circulation has weakened to a thousand-year low.

input.document: Liverpool defeated Manchester City 3-1 at Anfield on Sunday in a Premier League match that put them five points clear at the top of the table. Mohamed Salah scored twice and Sadio Mane added the third.

reference.goldSummary: Liverpool beat Manchester City 3-1 to extend their Premier League lead.
